title: Fixed+
description: Fixed from Green_Jab + suggested Mods and some of my preferences
body:
Mod by Green_Jab which tries to fix the vanilla game. I added the mentioned additinal mods, as well as some of my preferences. 
I was able to make some basic checks and all mods included seemed to work toghter.

# Content, which I don't own, inside this pack:
## Required by the mod:

- fabric
- [fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [language kotlin by modmuss50](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) 

## Suggested mods as in hes last video:

- [Shulkerboxtooltips by MisterPeModder](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)
- [hotbarcycle by nyuppo](https://modrinth.com/mod/hotbarcycle)

## Additinal mods:

- [No Chat Reports by Aizistral](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)
- [Better F3 by TreyRuffy](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)
- [Simple Voice Chat by henkelmax](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)
- [modmenu by modmuss50](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

## Additinal texture pack (They need to be activated manually):
- [Colourful containers Dark Mode GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colourful-containers-dark-mode-gui)
- [Enchant Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchant-icons-countxd)

# Licensing
The ressources I do not own in this modpack have their own licensing. The license on this modpack is for possible future content from myself.

# Server (german)

Willst du auf einem Server spielen? Ich werde, wenn alles klappt, morgen am 13.12. um 13 Uhr einen starten. Adresse: mc.7or.ch
